text: As in many private sector contexts, the firm offers performance pay to workers and supervisors. Workers earn a monthly base salary based on attendance as well as weekly individual bonus, based on their individual output, and group bonus, based on their team’s output. 3 We use the state-of-the-art GPT-4o model developed by OpenAI to extract the most common sentiments from supervisors’ open text responses.
matched_l1_methods: Computational, Data Science, and Machine Learning
